title: BEM-542.3 provider probe adapter
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
cycle = 'bem542-real-orchestrator-test'

provider_state = json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text()) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}
role_state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}

# Provider probe rules: must check Claude before reserve. No silent GPT reserve.
def provider_decision(signal):
    if signal == 'active' or signal == 'completed':
        return {'selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False,'reason':'claude_primary_available'}
    if signal in ['failed','cancelled','timeout','missing_result_after_ttl']:
        return {'selected_provider':'gpt','reserve_used':True,'reason':'claude_' + signal}
    return {'selected_provider':'curator','reserve_used':False,'reason':'unknown_provider_signal'}

signals = ['active', 'failed']
records = []
for signal in signals:
    d = provider_decision(signal)
    rec = {
      'record_type': 'provider_selection_decision',
      'cycle_id': cycle,
      'source': 'internal_provider_adapter',
      'from_role': 'provider_adapter',
      'to_role': 'curator',
      'provider_probe_signal': signal,
      'primary_provider': 'claude',
      'reserve_provider': 'gpt',
      'selected_provider': d['selected_provider'],
      'reserve_used': d['reserve_used'],
      'reason': d['reason'],
      'status': 'completed',
      'artifact_path': 'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542/provider_selection_' + signal + '.json',
      'commit_sha': None,
      'blocker': None,
      'created_at': '2026-05-17 | 14:15 (UTC+3)'
    }
    (base/('provider_selection_' + signal + '.json')).write_text(json.dumps(rec, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    records.append(rec)

with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for rec in records:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

# The current active decision must prefer Claude when active; failed branch proves reserve only after failure.
active_ok = records[0]['selected_provider'] == 'claude' and records[0]['reserve_used'] == False
failed_ok = records[1]['selected_provider'] == 'gpt' and records[1]['reserve_used'] == True
ok = active_ok and failed_ok

provider_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:15 (UTC+3)'
provider_state['last_probe_policy'] = 'probe_primary_claude_before_reserve'
provider_state['last_active_probe_result'] = records[0]
provider_state['last_failure_probe_result'] = records[1]
provider_state['selected_provider'] = 'claude'
provider_state['last_switch_reason'] = None
provider_state['blocker'] = None if ok else {'code':'PROVIDER_PROBE_DECISION_FAILED'}
provider_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(provider_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

role_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:15 (UTC+3)'
role_state['cycle_id'] = cycle
role_state['active_role'] = 'provider_adapter'
role_state['next_role'] = 'analyst'
role_state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-542.3','title':'Provider probe before reserve','status':'completed' if ok else 'blocked'}
role_state['blocker'] = None if ok else {'code':'PROVIDER_PROBE_DECISION_FAILED'}
hist = role_state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list): hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:15 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-542.3 provider probe decisions','status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','claude_active_selected':'claude','claude_failed_selected':'gpt'})
role_state['history'] = hist
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(role_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem542_3_provider_probe_adapter.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-542.3 | Provider Probe Before Reserve | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:15 (UTC+3)\n\n## Что проверено\nProvider adapter не переключает молча на GPT reserve. Сначала фиксируется provider probe.\n\n| Probe signal | Selected provider | Reserve used | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| active | ' + records[0]['selected_provider'] + ' | ' + str(records[0]['reserve_used']) + ' | Claude доступен, reserve запрещён |\n| failed | ' + records[1]['selected_provider'] + ' | ' + str(records[1]['reserve_used']) + ' | Claude failed, reserve разрешён |\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else 'PROVIDER_PROBE_DECISION_FAILED') + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem542_3_provider_probe_adapter.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-542.3 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': Claude active -> Claude selected; Claude failed -> GPT reserve.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(base/'provider_selection_active.json'), str(base/'provider_selection_failed.json'), str(transport), str(provider_state_path), str(role_state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-542.3 provider probe before reserve completed')
"""
No issue comments.
